name: Schemathesis
description: Schemathesis — OSS API fuzzing and testing tool that auto-generates property-based test cases from OpenAPI schemas.

seo.title: Schemathesis — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: Schemathesis: Schemathesis — OSS API fuzzing and testing tool that auto-generates property-based test cases from OpenAPI schemas.

when_to_use: Property-based API fuzzing from OpenAPI specs
Auto-generate test cases to find edge-case API bugs
Detect 500 errors from malformed API request permutations
Integrate API fuzz testing into CI for every PR

pros: Property-based fuzzing finds real edge cases
cons: Only as good as your OpenAPI coverage
review.verdict: One of the highest ROI API testing tools if you already maintain a decent OpenAPI schema.
review.best_for: Teams with OpenAPI-first APIs wanting automated fuzzing coverage
review.not_for: APIs without schemas or where manual test design is preferred
